title: limonium pectinatum var. corculum
intro: Limonium pectinatum var. corculum, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Limonium pectinatum var. corculum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and its essential oil can be extracted through steam distillation for topical and aromatherapeutic use.
